title: buildah images were deleted in quay.io
body:
Not sure that this is the right place to create an issue but I don't know where else I can find information. 
About 40 minutes ago all buildah images were removed from quay.io: https://quay.io/repository/buildah/stable?tab=history

comments.body: Most likely related to the security notice present on the information page
For updates and status, we've opened a discussion in Podman's GitHub.  https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions/19796
